response.description_short: Atlas Relay is a developer platform whose SDK and API add chat, comments, and notifications to products, with moderation and translation built in.
response.description_long:
Atlas Relay sells in-app messaging as an API: one SDK adds chat, comments, and notifications, with moderation, translation, and offline sync included. Prebuilt UI kits for web, iOS, and Android are designed to get teams to production in a sprint, while the underlying API allows later customization.

The company cites 99.95% uptime over the last twelve months across three regions and offers EU data residency. Founded in 2020 in New York, NY, it is led by co-founders Sofia Marchetti (CEO) and James Whitaker (CTO), and prices by usage.
